title: Manage a Composer dependency change
description: Add or upgrade a dependency deliberately, regenerating the lock and verifying constraints and platform requirements.
body: Steps: 1. Add the package with composer require using a caret/tilde constraint that matches your support policy. 2. Let Composer resolve and regenerate composer.lock, reviewing the diff for transitive changes. 3. Check platform requirements (php version, ext-*) resolve on your targets. 4. Run the PHPUnit suite and any static analysis (PHPStan/Psalm). 5. Commit composer.json and composer.lock together. Rollback point: before committing the lock, since reverting both files restores the prior graph. Validation: composer install reproduces the same vendor/ on a clean checkout and the suite stays green.
